atomic_facts.fact: A hand is using a metal spoon to scoop yellow rice from a pressure cooker.
The spoon transfers a portion of the rice into an oval metal dish.
The pressure cooker is placed on the burner of a white gas stove.
The oval dish rests on a green cutting board.

spatial: The stainless steel pressure cooker is centered on the white gas stovetop. To the right of the cooker, a green cutting board sits on the counter. An oval metal dish is placed on top of the green cutting board. A hand holding a spoon is positioned above the oval dish, transferring food from the cooker to the dish. A white disposable plate is visible to the far left of the stove.

spatial: The pressure cooker is in the center of the frame, sitting on the stovetop. To the right of the pot, an oval dish rests on a green cutting board. To the left of the pot, a white plate is visible. The hand is positioned above the pot, holding the spoon inside it.
